name: create_new_file
description: Create a new blank Figma file in the authenticated user's drafts folder. Use this tool when you need a new file to work with before calling use_figma. Returns the new file key and URL. Requires a planKey. If the user already provided a planKey, use it directly. Otherwise, call the whoami tool first to get the list of plans. If the user has one plan, use its "key" field. If multiple, ask the user which team or organization to use.

fileName.description: The name for the new Figma file.

planKey.description: The team or organization key where the file should be created. Obtain this from the whoami tool — it is the "key" field in each plan.

editorType.description: The type of Figma file to create. "design" creates a Figma design file. "figjam" creates a FigJam whiteboard file.
